function.signature: int nr_ulsch_pre_encoding(PHY_VARS_NR_UE *ue, const NR_UE_ULSCH_t *ulsch, const uint32_t frame, const uint8_t slot, const unsigned int *G, const int nb_ulsch, const uint8_t *ULSCH_ids)

bug.description: use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed

prompt:
There is a use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed downstream of function nr_ulsch_pre_encoding in the openair1/PHY/NR_UE_TRANSPORT subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/NR_UE_TRANSPORT/nr_ulsch_coding.c:37.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
